final:
module dram_cell(  
    input wire D,  
    input wire WL,  
    input wire clk,  
    output reg Q  
);  
    reg stored_data;  
    always @(posedge clk) begin  
        if (WL) begin  
            stored_data <= D;  
        end  
        Q <= stored_data;  
    end  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
